questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Content Delivery (CDN)?
options: Inefficient scaling of CDNs geo-routing DNS resolutions, static file edge servers, and origin shields.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of CDNs geo-routing DNS resolutions, static file edge servers, and origin shields.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how CDNs geo-routing DNS resolutions, static file edge servers, and origin shields scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
